channel.title: RSS Aggregator Feed
channel.description: An aggregated feed of Technology-related news

item.title: New 'scareware' attack hits 2.8 million victims, pretending to lock them out of your browser — here’s how you can stay safe
item.description: CypherLoc scareware spreads through phishing emails, locking browsers visually while scammers use fake alerts and support calls to steal information.

item.title: I test ThinkPads for a living and these are the best 14-inch business laptop deals for professionals and power users in Lenovo's Memorial Day sale
item.description: These 14-inch laptops from Lenovo are perfect for professionals.

item.title: Best Buy's Memorial Day video editing laptop and PC deals end in a matter of hours — and they're packed with DDR5 memory, and RTX 5060, 5070, and 5080 graphics cards that are perfect for content creators
item.description: Awesome savings, but not much time left to get the discount.

item.title: The Electric Ferrari Luce Is Finally Here
item.description: The covers have come off the Ferrari Luce, the most anticipated EV ever. It completely breaks the Italian car maker's aesthetic archetype.

item.title: FBI warns of Kali phishing scam hitting Microsoft OAuth tokens — warns 'Kali365 lowers the barrier of entry, providing less-technical attackers access to AI-generated phishing lures'
item.description: A new phishing kit is being offered on Telegram allowing even newbie hackers an easy way to grab OAuth tokens.

item.title: How to watch the 2026 American Music Awards online — stream Teddy Swims, Keith Urban performances live from anywhere
item.description: Taylor Swift bags eight nominations with Billy Idol set to receive Lifetime Achievement Award. Here's how to watch the 2026 American Music Awards online and from anywhere.

item.title: Amazon’s Memorial Day Lego sale is packed with Star Wars, Botanicals, Art, and Creator set deals – but it's ending soon
Ferrari Luce unveiled: Here's the first car from Jony Ive's design house
item.description: Our first look at a complete version of Ferrari's upcoming luxury EV that was designed by LoveFrom.

item.title: Voici la Ferrari Luce : la première voiture électrique de la marque brise tous les codes
item.description: Voici la Ferrari Luce, la première voiture électrique de la marque. Pour convaincre les sceptiques, elle mise sur un design cosigné du créateur de l’iPhone, un habitacle unique en son genre et une fiche technique musclée : 4 moteurs, 1 050 ch et un 0 à 100 km/h en 2,5 secondes. Suffisant pour séduire ?

item.title: Je suis monté à bord de la première Ferrari électrique de l’histoire : une véritable claque à tous les niveaux
item.description: Nous sommes montés à bord de la Ferrari Luce, la première voiture électrique de l’histoire de la marque. Une voiture radicale dans son approche : outre la motorisation en elle-même, son design conçu par le créateur de l’iPhone, sa nouvelle approche du poste de conduite et sa fiche technique vont faire parler d’eux. Voici nos premières impressions. ...

item.title: The Many Lives of Benjaman Kyle on HBO Max had Natalia Grace producer 'in tears' after man found naked behind Burger King with total amnesia couldn't remember past — 'I felt like I was never going to be normal again'
item.description: You watched The Curious Case of Natalia Grace, so now get ready for The Many Lives on Benjaman Kyle... and frankly, the drama is even more mind-boggling.

item.title: You think your World Cup TV setup is good? This custom 9.4.4-channel Dolby Atmos home theater was designed for sports, with a unique smart 'Football Mode' and powerful sound that's probably louder than a real stadium crowd
item.description: This CEDIA EMEA award-winning home cinema isn't just great for movies: it's perfect for the World Cup too!

item.title: Trend Micro users beware - dangerous Apex One zero-day exploited in the wild
item.description: CISA has already added the flaw to its KEV database.
